Correctness of Input"}], "description": "### Impact

It was possible to trigger repository updates for many repositories via a crafted webhook payload.

### Patches

* https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/pull/17221

### Workarounds

Disabling webhooks completely using ENABLE_HOOKS avoids this vulnerability.

### References

Thanks to Hector Ruiz Ruiz & NaxusAI for responsibly disclosing this vulnerability to us.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00239, "percentile": 0.14884}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-pj86-258h-qrvf", "github_reviewed_at": "2025-12-15T22:01:04Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pj86-258h-qrvf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-pj86-258h-qrvf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2025-67492"}], "nvd_published_at": "2025-12-16T01:15:51Z", "published_at": "2025-12-15T22:01:04Z", "references": ["https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/security/advisories/GHSA-pj86-258h-qrvf", "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate/pull/17221", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-67492", "https://github.com/pypa/advisory-database/tree/main/vulns/weblate/PYSEC-2025-232.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-pj86-258h-qrvf"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/WeblateOrg/weblate/security-advisories/GHSA-pj86-258h-qrvf", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/WeblateOrg/weblate", "summary": "Weblate's over‑permissive webhook endpoint enables mass repository updates and component enumeration", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T19:53:34Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-pj86-258h-qrvf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.15", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "Weblate"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 5.15"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Weblate's over‑permissive webhook endpoint enables mass repository updates and component enumeration
